profiles.name: Base Runtime
profiles.description: Canonical suite defaults shared by every execution context before local, CI, or staging overrides are layered in.
profiles.yaml:
env:
  LOG_LEVEL: info
  TELEMETRY_PROFILE: balanced
  DISPATCHER_BASE_URL: http://dispatcher-api.internal
services:
  redisAddress: redis-cache:6379
  plannerRefreshInterval: 5s

profiles.name: Local Debug
profiles.description: Browser-forwarded ports and verbose telemetry payloads.
profiles.yaml:
env:
  LOG_LEVEL: debug
  TELEMETRY_PROFILE: verbose
services:
  uiPort: 13000
  dispatcherPort: 18081

profiles.name: Performance
profiles.description: Synthetic bursts for planner saturation tests.
profiles.yaml:
env:
  TELEMETRY_PROFILE: burst
  ENABLE_ROUTE_HEATMAP: true
services:
  plannerWorkers: 6
  ingestBatchSize: 500

profiles.name: Staging
profiles.description: Shared staging identities and realistic routing backends.
profiles.yaml:
env:
  DISPATCHER_BASE_URL: https://dispatcher.staging.company.test
  TELEMETRY_PROFILE: realistic
services:
  plannerWorkers: 3
  uiPort: 8080

profiles.name: Base Runtime
profiles.description: Canonical suite defaults shared by every execution context before local, CI, or staging overrides are layered in.
profiles.yaml:
env:
  LOG_LEVEL: info
  SESSION_STORE: postgres
  OIDC_DISCOVERY_URL: http://oidc-mock.internal/.well-known/openid-configuration
services:
  postgresURL: postgres://test:test@broker-db:5432/identity
  sessionQueue: session-worker

profiles.name: Local Debug
profiles.description: Relaxed certificates and hot-reloadable providers.
profiles.yaml:
env:
  LOG_LEVEL: debug
  COOKIE_SECURE: false
services:
  brokerPort: 18082
  sessionWorkerConcurrency: 1

profiles.name: Canary
profiles.description: New session persistence behavior and stricter cookie policies.
profiles.yaml:
env:
  SESSION_STORE: redis
  ENABLE_NEW_COOKIE_POLICY: true
services:
  sessionWorkerConcurrency: 4
  tokenRotationWindow: 15m

profiles.name: CI Smoke
profiles.description: Fast login assertions with deterministic realms.
profiles.yaml:
env:
  LOG_LEVEL: warn
  ENABLE_NEW_COOKIE_POLICY: true
services:
  brokerPort: 8080
  sessionWorkerConcurrency: 2

profiles.name: Base Runtime
profiles.description: Canonical suite defaults shared by every execution context before local, CI, or staging overrides are layered in.
profiles.yaml:
env:
  LOG_LEVEL: info
  PAYMENTS_API_BASE_URL: http://payment-gateway.internal
  FRAUD_STRATEGY: standard
services:
  payment_gateway:
    env:
      POSTGRES_URL: postgres://test:test@db:5432/payments
  fraud_worker:
    env:
      KAFKA_BROKER: kafka:9092

profiles.name: Local Debug
profiles.description: Verbose logs, local secrets, and relaxed timeouts.
profiles.yaml:
env:
  LOG_LEVEL: debug
  FRAUD_STRATEGY: permissive
services:
  payment_gateway:
    env:
      API_PORT: 18080
      CHECKOUT_MODE: local-debug
  fraud_worker:
    env:
      WORKER_REPLICA_COUNT: 1

profiles.name: Staging
profiles.description: Production-like service topology with settings-managed secret injection.
profiles.yaml:
env:
  PAYMENTS_API_BASE_URL: https://payments.staging.company.test
  FRAUD_STRATEGY: strict
services:
  payment_gateway:
    env:
      API_PORT: 8080
      ROUTING_MODE: staging
  fraud_worker:
    env:
      WORKER_REPLICA_COUNT: 3
      DECISION_MODE: strict

profiles.name: Year-End
profiles.description: Ledger rollover fixtures, end-of-year reporting toggles, and settlement edge cases.
profiles.yaml:
env:
  LEDGER_PERIOD: year_end
  FRAUD_STRATEGY: settlement_review
services:
  payment_gateway:
    env:
      SETTLEMENT_BATCH_SIZE: 500
  fraud_worker:
    env:
      REPLAY_HISTORICAL_CHARGES: true
      LEDGER_CLOSE_MODE: year-end

profiles.yaml:

profiles.name: Base Runtime
profiles.description: Canonical suite defaults shared by every execution context before local, CI, or staging overrides are layered in.
profiles.yaml:
env:
  LOG_LEVEL: info
  STOREFRONT_BASE_URL: http://storefront-ui.internal
  PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSER: chromium
services:
  kafkaBroker: kafka:9092
  mockApiBaseUrl: http://storefront-api.internal

profiles.name: Local Debug
profiles.description: Opens browser traces, seeded demo users, and single-worker Kafka consumption.
profiles.yaml:
env:
  LOG_LEVEL: debug
  PLAYWRIGHT_TRACE: on
  MOCK_SCENARIO: local
services:
  uiPort: 14010
  consumerWorkers: 1

profiles.name: CI Browser
profiles.description: Headless Playwright suite with tighter timeouts and deterministic mocks.
profiles.yaml:
env:
  PLAYWRIGHT_HEADLESS: true
  PLAYWRIGHT_TRACE: retain-on-failure
  MOCK_SCENARIO: ci
services:
  uiPort: 8080
  consumerWorkers: 2

profiles.name: Promo Burst
profiles.description: High-throughput cart and checkout traffic with promotional catalog fixtures.
profiles.yaml:
env:
  CAMPAIGN_MODE: spring_promo
  PLAYWRIGHT_HEADLESS: true
  MOCK_SCENARIO: promo
services:
  consumerWorkers: 4
  productSeedSet: promo-heavy
